title: AppSettings
description: User-configurable application settings, persisted as JSON

autoCopyUrl.description: Auto-copy deployment URL to clipboard after deploy

enableRuntimeVerification.description: Enable Puppeteer-based runtime verification after deploy

projectNamePrefix.description: Optional prefix for auto-generated Vercel project names

lastFolderPath.description: Last selected Keynote export folder path

secureEmbed.description: Enable secure embed protections (disable downloads, restrict iframe)

embedAllowedDomains.description: Space-separated list of domains allowed to embed via CSP frame-ancestors
